entries.summary: Completed Phase 1: Configuration Fix and Integration. Added ConfigContext class, fixed ContextLayerStage initialization, implemented configuration validation with health checks and graceful degradation, created database integration tests, and established proper Python package structure with __init__.py files.
top_rejection_reasons: Missing __init__.py files for complete Python package structure
Tests using generic mocks instead of actual model instances
lessons_learned: Python package structure requires __init__.py files in all directories containing Python modules
Reviewer is strict about complete package structure consistency
Simple directory creation tasks still require full QA gate process
ESLint tool misconfigured for Python projects causes false failures

entries.summary: Configuration Fix and Integration - All configuration classes and directory structures already implemented from previous work
top_rejection_reasons: No rejections - tasks were already completed
lessons_learned: Configuration classes were already fully implemented from previous phases
Directory structures with __init__.py files were already created
Database integration tests already exist for _get_photos_without_context() method
Health check and graceful degradation already implemented in ContextLayerStage.__init__()
